name: Axehole Pickleball
description: We are new to pickleball in Lexington NC.  We offer indoor play on Thursday nights beginning at 6pm.  We have a potluck each event, so bring food or snacks and socialize!!  We have drinks and full ABC permitted bar.  All skill levels are welcomed!

name: Bingham Tennis Center
description: Bingham Tennis Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Lexington, NC. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The facility includes amenities like lights. The courts are free.

name: Bombay Park
description: Bombay Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Denton, NC. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: Charles England Park
description: Charles England Park is a place to play pickleball in Lexington, NC. There is 1 outdoor hard court. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The court is free.

name: J Smith Young YMCA
description: Pickleball courts are located on the back side of the gym.
open_play_schedule: More experienced players use the 1st two courts and beginners use the 3rd court depending on numbers each day.
fees: Members only — YMCA Membership required to access the favilities.

name: Lexington Golf Club
description: Lexington Golf Club is a place to play pickleball in Lexington, NC. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like lights.

name: Southmont Park
description: Southmont Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Lexington, NC. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like water and restrooms.

name: Thomasville Central Recreation Center
description: Come play pickleball at Thomasville Central Recreation Center in Thomasville, NC! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Reservations are not available. Amenities include restrooms and water.

name: Tom A. Finch Community YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Tom A. Finch Community YMCA in Thomasville, NC! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. The courts can be reserved. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights.
